official_requirements.evidence_needed: Project must fit Semiconductors, Life Sciences or Engineering Biology.
At least one non-linked registered Swiss implementation partner applying to Innosuisse.
At least one UK or Swiss research institute, unless the Swiss applicant is an individual pre-market start-up with fewer than 50 FTE.
No one country or project partner can represent more than 70 percent of total project cost.
UK project grant funding request must be no greater than GBP450,000.
Enterprise Europe Network supports Swiss and UK organisations in identifying suitable project partners.

targets.name: Enterprise Europe Network Switzerland
targets.subject: Partner-search request for UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3 - Aureon Evidence OS
evidence_asks: Swiss implementation partner candidates in Semiconductors, Life Sciences, or Engineering Biology
whether a Swiss research institute is needed or whether any start-up waiver could apply
recommended partner-commitment and budget evidence for the joint application
any permit, regulated-activity, or export-control questions we should resolve before IFS completion

targets.name: UK-Switzerland bilateral R&D B2Match marketplace
targets.subject: B2Match profile evidence request - Aureon Evidence OS for UK-Switzerland CR&D
evidence_asks: Swiss company profile and named contact interested in evidence assurance or regulated R&D workflow support
partner role statement, work package fit, and whether the partner is applying to Innosuisse
indicative budget owner and cost split
research institute involvement or waiver position

targets.name: Innovate UK Business Connect
targets.contact_route: Global Alliance / Semiconductors / Engineering Biology / Health teams
targets.subject: Partner and scope support request for UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3
evidence_asks: which permitted theme, if any, can fit Aureon Evidence OS as an assurance work package
Swiss partner-search route for implementation partners
whether a research institute must be added for this draft
what evidence is needed before completing IFS Q4, Q6, Q17, finances, Project Impact, and award terms

targets.name: Innosuisse Switzerland-UK call route
targets.contact_route: Innosuisse call guidance and application platform route
targets.subject: Swiss-side eligibility route for staged UK-Switzerland CR&D application
evidence_asks: Swiss-side eligibility route for an implementation partner
whether a Swiss research institution is required for the likely project structure
which Innosuisse templates and finance tables the Swiss partner must complete
timing and evidence expectations before Innovate UK IFS completion

decision.why_not_now: Partner acquisition payloads are prepared, but they are not partner commitments. IFS completion remains blocked until a Swiss implementation partner, research institute or waiver, partner budget, and declaration evidence are received.
decision.next_operator_action: Use these payloads only after exact action-time approval for the target and channel, then classify replies before any IFS portal edit.

controls: Official sources were checked before refreshing this acquisition pack.
Outreach payloads were prepared locally only.
No external email, contact form, B2Match message, account creation, partner invite, portal upload or IFS submission was performed.
No Q4 permit/licence declaration was made.
No Q6 export-control declaration was made.
No cost, finance, Project Impact or award-terms field was completed.
No password, bank detail, tax identifier or runtime secret was written to this artifact.
